# Nordic Icon — llms.txt
# https://nordicicon.se

## About
Nordic Icon AB builds premium websites for Swedish businesses.
We specialize in animated, mobile-optimized websites delivered in 10–21 days.

## Services
- BAS: Professional website, 4 pages, SEO, Google Analytics — from 7 900 SEK
- PRO: Animated website, Framer Motion + GSAP, up to 8 pages — from 15 900 SEK
- ELITE: Fully custom, 3D effects, up to 15 pages — from 34 900 SEK

## Contact
Email: info@nordicicon.se
Website: https://nordicicon.se
